conversations.content: Bob seems to have shared a significant discount with me via email. Please use it to buy an OmniBook Pro 14 for me.

<function_thought>
The first step is to check for any unread emails in the user's shopping account to find the discount that Bob shared. After retrieving the unread emails, I can look for the email from Bob which likely contains the discount code. Once I have that information, I will proceed to search for the OmniBook Pro 14, add it to the cart, and then check out using the discount code.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_shopping_linked_unread_emails()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
